org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure

Enum ResizeDirection

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<ResizeDirection>
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.ResizeDirection
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<ResizeDirection>

    public enum ResizeDirection
extends Enum<ResizeDirection>
    Direction of resizing.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant and Description
      EAST
      resize to the east
      NORTH
      resize to the north
      NORTH_EAST
      resize to the north east
      NORTH_WEST
      resize to the north west
      SOUTH
      resize to the south
      SOUTH_EAST
      resize to the south east
      SOUTH_WEST
      resize to the southwest
      WEST
      resize to the west

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static ResizeDirection findResizingDirection(float x, float y, Rectangle2f bounds, float handleSize)
      Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.

      Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.

      Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.

      Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.

      Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.

      Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.

      Replies if the given point is inside the given rectangle.

      Replies if the given area intersects the given rectangle.
      (package private) abstract boolean isResizingRectangle(float x, float y, float rrMinX, float rrCenterX, float rrMaxX, float rrMinY, float rrCenterY, float rrMaxY, float rrWidth, float rrHeight)
      Replies if the specified point is inside the resizing rectangle of this direction according to the given coordinates of the enclosing figure.

      Replies if the specified area intersects the resizing rectangle of this direction according to the given coordinates of the enclosing figure.

      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.

      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • NORTH_WEST

        public static final ResizeDirection NORTH_WEST
        resize to the north west

        resize to the north

        resize to the north east

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static ResizeDirection[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (ResizeDirection c : ResizeDirection.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static ResizeDirection valueOf(String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      • isResizingRectangle

        abstract boolean isResizingRectangle(float x,
                          float y,
                          float rrMinX,
                          float rrCenterX,
                          float rrMaxX,
                          float rrMinY,
                          float rrCenterY,
                          float rrMaxY,
                          float rrWidth,
                          float rrHeight)
        Replies if the specified point is inside the resizing rectangle of this direction according to the given coordinates of the enclosing figure.
        Parameters:
        x - is the coordinate of the point to test.
        y - is the coordinate of the point to test.
        rrMinX - is the lowest X coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrCenterX - is the center X coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrMaxX - is the uppest X coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrMinY - is the lowest Y coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrCenterY - is the center Y coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrMaxY - is the uppest Y coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrWidth - is the size of the resizing rectangle.
        rrHeight - is the size of the resizing rectangle.
        Returns:
        true if the specified point is in the resizing rectangle of this direction; otherwise false

      • isResizingRectangle

        abstract boolean isResizingRectangle(Shape2f pointerArea,
                          float rrMinX,
                          float rrCenterX,
                          float rrMaxX,
                          float rrMinY,
                          float rrCenterY,
                          float rrMaxY,
                          float rrWidth,
                          float rrHeight)
        Replies if the specified area intersects the resizing rectangle of this direction according to the given coordinates of the enclosing figure.
        Parameters:
        pointerArea - is the area covered by the mouse.
        rrMinX - is the lowest X coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrCenterX - is the center X coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrMaxX - is the uppest X coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrMinY - is the lowest Y coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrCenterY - is the center Y coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrMaxY - is the uppest Y coordinate of the enclosing figure.
        rrWidth - is the size of the resizing rectangle.
        rrHeight - is the size of the resizing rectangle.
        Returns:
        true if the given area intersects the resizing rectangle of this direction; otherwise false

      • isInsideRectangle

        static boolean isInsideRectangle(float x,
                        float y,
                        float rrX,
                        float rrY,
                        float rrWidth,
                        float rrHeight)
        Replies if the given point is inside the given rectangle.
        Parameters:
        x -
        y -
        rrX -
        rrY -
        rrWidth -
        rrHeight -
        Returns:
        true if the point is inside the rectangle; otherwise false.

      • isIntersectRectangle

        static boolean isIntersectRectangle(Shape2f area,
                           float rrX,
                           float rrY,
                           float rrWidth,
                           float rrHeight)
        Replies if the given area intersects the given rectangle.
        Parameters:
        area -
        rrX -
        rrY -
        rrWidth -
        rrHeight -
        Returns:
        true if the point is inside the rectangle; otherwise false.

      • findResizingDirection

        public static ResizeDirection findResizingDirection(float x,
                                    float y,
                                    Rectangle2f bounds,
                                    float handleSize)
        Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.
        Parameters:
        x - the horizontal position of the mouse.
        y - the vertical position of the mouse.
        bounds - are the bounds of the area to consider.
        handleSize - is the size of the handles that permits to resize.
        Returns:
        the resize direction; or null if the specified point is not on a valid resizing handler.
        See Also:
        getResizingDirection(float, float, Rectangle2f, float, ResizeDirection...)

      • getResizingDirection

        public static ResizeDirection getResizingDirection(float x,
                                   float y,
                                   Rectangle2f bounds,
                                   float handleSize,
                                   ResizeDirection... directionsToTest)
        Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.
        Parameters:
        x - the horizontal position of the mouse.
        y - the vertical position of the mouse.
        bounds - are the bounds of the area to consider.
        handleSize - is the size of the handles that permits to resize.
        directionsToTest - are the directions to test.
        Returns:
        the resize direction; or null if the specified point is not on a valid resizing handler.
        See Also:
        findResizingDirection(float, float, Rectangle2f, float)

      • getResizingDirection

        public static ResizeDirection getResizingDirection(float x,
                                   float y,
                                   Rectangle2f bounds,
                                   float handleSize,
                                   Collection<ResizeDirection> directionsToTest)
        Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.
        Parameters:
        x - the horizontal position of the mouse.
        y - the vertical position of the mouse.
        bounds - are the bounds of the area to consider.
        handleSize - is the size of the handles that permits to resize.
        directionsToTest - are the directions to test.
        Returns:
        the resize direction; or null if the specified point is not on a valid resizing handler.
        See Also:
        findResizingDirection(float, float, Rectangle2f, float)

      • findResizingDirection

        public static ResizeDirection findResizingDirection(Shape2f pointerArea,
                                    Rectangle2f bounds,
                                    float handleSize)
        Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.
        Parameters:
        pointerArea - is the area covered by the mouse.
        bounds - are the bounds of the area to consider.
        handleSize - is the size of the handles that permits to resize.
        Returns:
        the resize direction; or null if the specified point is not on a valid resizing handler.
        See Also:
        getResizingDirection(float, float, Rectangle2f, float, ResizeDirection...)

      • getResizingDirection

        public static ResizeDirection getResizingDirection(Shape2f pointerArea,
                                   Rectangle2f bounds,
                                   float handleSize,
                                   ResizeDirection... directionsToTest)
        Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.
        Parameters:
        pointerArea - is the area covered by the mouse.
        bounds - are the bounds of the area to consider.
        handleSize - is the size of the handles that permits to resize.
        directionsToTest - are the directions to test.
        Returns:
        the resize direction; or null if the specified point is not on a valid resizing handler.
        See Also:
        findResizingDirection(float, float, Rectangle2f, float)

      • getResizingDirection

        public static ResizeDirection getResizingDirection(Shape2f pointerArea,
                                   Rectangle2f bounds,
                                   float handleSize,
                                   Collection<ResizeDirection> directionsToTest)
        Reply the direction of the resizing if the mouse is on a resize area.
        Parameters:
        pointerArea - is the area covered by the mouse.
        bounds - are the bounds of the area to consider.
        handleSize - is the size of the handles that permits to resize.
        directionsToTest - are the directions to test.
        Returns:
        the resize direction; or null if the specified point is not on a valid resizing handler.
        See Also:
        findResizingDirection(float, float, Rectangle2f, float)
